zh.Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinla: 德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck於1215年出生時，他的父親Friedrich I von Saarbrücken29歲，母親Agnes Countess of Eberstein31歲。他於大約1241年與Elisabeth d'Aspremont在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1279年享年64歲。

zh-hans.Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhinela: 德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根

zh-hans.Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinla: 德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck于1215年出生时，他的父亲Friedrich I von Saarbrücken29岁，母亲Agnes Countess of Eberstein31岁。他于大约1241年与Elisabeth d'Aspremont在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1279年享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Emich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck was born in 1215, his father, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, was 31. He married Elisabeth d'Aspremont about 1241, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1279, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck est né en 1215, son père, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth d'Aspremont environ 1241, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1279, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck 1215 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I von Saarbrücken 29 und seine Mutter Agnes Countess of Eberstein 31. Er hat um 1241 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Elisabeth d'Aspremont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1279 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck è nato il nel 1215, il suo padre, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth d'Aspremont circa 1241, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1279, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeckが1215年に生まれた時，父Friedrich I von Saarbrückenは29歳，母Agnes Countess of Ebersteinは31歳であった。約1241年にドイツバイエルンプファルズでElisabeth d'Aspremontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1279年に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck(이)가 1215년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I von Saarbrücken(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Countess of Eberstein(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1241년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Elisabeth d'Aspremont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck nasceu em 1215, seu pai, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth d'Aspremont aproximadamente 1241, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1279, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck родился в 1215 г., его отцу по имени Friedrich I von Saarbrücken было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Countess of Eberstein, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth d'Aspremont около 1241 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1279 г. в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck nació en 1215, su papá, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elisabeth d'Aspremont aproximadamente 1241, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1279, a la edad de 64 años.
